topics.label: Modules (ESM & CJS)
topics.description: import/export (ESM) and require/module.exports (CJS). Node.js module system.

topics.label: Streams
topics.description: Readable, Writable, Transform streams for processing large data efficiently.

topics.label: Events
topics.description: EventEmitter pattern — on, emit, once. Foundation of Node.js architecture.
